ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertising campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (Local or Global) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Methodology used in the campaign */,
  "hours" INTEGER /* Duration of the campaign in hours */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha parameter used in the campaign */,
  "train_part" REAL /* Training part parameter */,
  "recommendation_part" REAL /* Recommendation part parameter */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the campaign */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the campaign */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the metrics belong to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metrics were recorded */,
  "total_impressions" INTEGER /* Total number of impressions for the campaign */,
  "eq_clicks" INTEGER /* Equivalent clicks calculated for the campaign */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Total number of clicks */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Total number of conversions */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost of the campaign */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impressions" (
  "impression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impression entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric entry the impressions belong to */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions on the platform */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the platform */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions on the platform */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost incurred on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impressions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impressions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impressions_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertising platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region supported by the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platforms_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the campaign */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targeting_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each targeting strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the targeting strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the targeting strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimization algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the optimization algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_targeting" (
  "campaign_targeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign targeting entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the targeting strategy used in the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_targeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_targeting_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES targeting_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_targeting_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_optimization" (
  "campaign_optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign optimization entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization algorithm used in the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_optimization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_optimization_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES optimization_algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_optimization_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
